prompt.content:
Update the merger model for RMBS and MTSI using, as of 01/02/2026, the closing price and number of weighted average diluted shares outstanding for RMBS and MTSI based on the income statement
- RMBS stand-alone equity value
- MTSI stand-alone equity value
- MTSI stand-alone equity value at bid premium
- Total consideration
- Pro forma bidder shares outstanding
- Exchange ratio for MTSI shareholders
- Ownership by RMBS
- Ownership by MTSI

Round all monetary figures other than share prices to thousands with no decimals, share prices to two decimals, ratios to one decimal, and percentages to one decimal.
